---
pagetitle: "Megafauna Workshop Galapagos 2026"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme:
      - default
      - ../../shared/theme/sb5.scss
    widescreen: true
    slide-number: true
    hash: true
    transition: none
    background-transition: none
    controls: true
    progress: true
    center: false
    margin: 0.015
    code-overflow: wrap
    footer: '<span class="footer-muted">Created by Isaac Brito-Morales</span><span class="footer-sep">|</span><a href="https://github.com/IsaakBM">GitHub</a><span class="footer-sep">|</span><a href="https://isaakbm.github.io/">Personal website</a><span class="footer-sep">|</span>'
---

## {background-image="../../shared/assets/images/whale-shark-wide.jpg" background-size="cover" background-position="center" .title-photo}

<div class="title-panel">
<h1>Marine Megafauna and<br>Climate Change Modeling Workshop</h1>
<p class="title-subtitle">Save the Blue Five | Santa Cruz, Galápagos | June 8-12, 2026</p>
<p class="title-description">Climate projections, biological data readiness, and first-generation species distribution models</p>
</div>

<div class="title-institution-panel">
<div class="title-meta">
<strong>Isaac Brito-Morales, PhD</strong><br>
June 2026
</div>
<div class="title-logo-strip">
<img src="../../shared/assets/logos/title/save-blue-five-title.png" class="sb5-title-logo" alt="Save the Blue Five logo">
<img src="../../shared/assets/logos/title/conservation-international-title.png" class="ci-title-logo" alt="Conservation International logo">
<img src="../../shared/assets/logos/title/ucsb-title.png" class="ucsb-title-logo" alt="UCSB logo">
</div>
</div>

---

{{< include sections/00_shared_framing.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/01_context_and_objectives.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/015_sdm_context.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/02_physical_modeling_downscaling.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/03_biological_data_status.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/04_first_generation_sdms.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/05_future_work_and_discussion.qmd >}}
